title: Apple Watch Series 8 [GPS + Cellular 41mm] Smart Watch w/Graphite Stainless Steel Case w/Midnight Sport Band-S/M. Fitness Tracker, Blood Oxygen & ECG Apps, Always-On Retina Display, Water Resistant
features: WHY APPLE WATCH SERIES 8 — Your essential companion for a healthy life is now even more powerful. Advanced sensors provide insights to help you better understand your health. New safety features can get you help when you need it. The bright, Always-On Retina display is easy to read, even when your wrist is down.

CELLULAR CONNECTIVITY — Send a text, make a call, and stream music without your iPhone, even while traveling internationally. Use Family Setup to manage Apple Watch for family members who don’t have an iPhone.
EASILY CUSTOMIZABLE — Available in a range of sizes and materials, with dozens of bands to choose from and watch faces with complications tailored to whatever you’re into.

INNOVATIVE SAFETY FEATURES — Crash Detection and Fall Detection can automatically connect you with emergency services in the event of a severe car crash or a hard fall. And Emergency SOS provides urgent assistance with the press of a button.

ADVANCED HEALTH FEATURES — Temperature sensing is a breakthrough feature that provides deep insights into women’s health. Keep an eye on your blood oxygen. Take an ECG anytime. Get notifications if you have an irregular rhythm. And see how much time you spent in REM, Core, or Deep sleep with Sleep Stages.

SIMPLY COMPATIBLE — It works seamlessly with your Apple devices and services. Unlock your Mac automatically. Find your devices with a tap. Pay and send money with Apple Pay. Apple Watch requires an iPhone 8 or later with the latest iOS version.
INCREDIBLE DURABILITY — Tougher than tough. It’s crack resistant, IP6X-certified dust resistant, and swimproof with WR50 water resistance.

A POWERFUL FITNESS PARTNER — The enhanced Workout app gives you new ways to train, and advanced metrics for more information about your workout performance. And Apple Watch comes with three months of Apple Fitness+ free.
APPS ON YOUR WRIST — With access to tens of thousands of apps on the App Store right on your wrist, Apple Watch is the perfect personal device for whatever you love to do.
LEGAL DISCLAIMERS — This is a summary of the main product features. See below to learn more.

title: Skinomi Screen Protector Compatible with Sony Smartwatch (6-Pack) Clear TechSkin TPU Anti-Bubble HD Film
description:
Protect your Investment
Daily use of your mobile device can cause unsightly scratches, dents, and other unwanted damage. Within a few months, the screen will be difficult to read; the device will decrease in resale value and be embarrassing to show other people. Lower-quality disposable screen protectors seem like a temporary solution for keeping your device looking brand new; though they need constant replacements.
The Only Screen Protector You'll Need
With this problem in mind the founders of Skinomi set out to create a screen protector that's tough, reliable, and long-lasting. Their solution was the Skinomi TechSkin.
Made of a thermoplastic urethane film that is designed to resist abrasion, the TechSkin Screen Protector compatible with the Sony Smartwatch provides impact absorbing military-grade protection for your device. The protector is UV resistant, HD Clear, and goes on invisible. A smooth texture and feel makes it easy to navigate your device as if there was nothing applied. The flexible high-grade film is formulated to be
"self-healing"
which makes it able to stretch, absorb, and even repair scratches and impact damage.
Lifetime Guarantee
We're so confident that you'll love the TechSkin that every Screen Protector comes with a
Lifetime Warranty
. If the Skinomi TechSkin wears off, we will replace it.
The anti-bubble installation process is easy and error-proof. Protect your possessions and never worry about having to replace that old screen protector again.
Skinomi Kit Includes:
Skinomi TechSkin Screen Protector
Skinomi TechSkin Screen Protector
High Grade Lint-less Microfiber Cloth
High Grade Lint-less Microfiber Cloth
Installation Solution
Installation Solution
Lifetime Warranty
Lifetime Warranty
Made in the USA

Skinomi TechSkin Screen Protector compatible with Sony Smartwatch
Skinomi TechSkin Screen Protector compatible with Sony Smartwatch
features: The TechSkin screen protector compatible with Sony Smartwatch is specifically designed using precise laser cutting technology to offer maximum screen coverage. Material flexibility allows total coverage even on curved devices
Self-Healing, flexible, tough, military-grade thermoplastic urethane, designed to absorb impact. The TechSkin is resistant against scratches, punctures, UV light and will not yellow
Easy, error-proof, and anti-bubble installation. Liquid solution allows adjustments during installation. Significantly reduces dust, oil and fingerprint smudges
Optically transparent, virtually invisible, and HD Clear screen protector with smooth glass-like surface and "True Touch" feel. A great alternative to a typical "static cling" PET screen protector
Lifetime Warranty from Manufacturer. Made in the USA. Includes original Skinomi TechSkin Screen Protector compatible with the Sony Smartwatch

reviews.title: 5-star product!
reviews.text: You have to love it when a product, even something as simple as a thin piece of plastic, outperforms your expectations. Packaged extremely well with everything you'd possibly need, I had my watch cleaned, prepped and completed in minutes. I will use the Skinomi brand for my iPad, Kindle Fire and Samsung Galaxy S III as soon as their old (non-Skinomi) screen protectors need replacement.

reviews.title: Really impressed
reviews.text: Got this for my Sony LiveView and while I was shocked to see that the installation process was more than other screen protectors (ie cell phone screen protectors), installation was pretty simple. After it dries, you can't even tell a screen protector is on!

reviews.title: It's soft
reviews.text:
Like another reviewer had mentioned, they are soft. I used a rubber squeegee that I've used on countless other screen savers, and it actually damaged the skin. It has permanent "bubbles" (more like dents) in it that will not go away. Other than that, the fit is perfect. And the skin comes very nicely packaged with everything you could ever need, including a bottle of soapy water for the application.

The attention to detail by Skinomi is second to none. The company gets five stars, but I've got to deduct one for the soft material. Skinomi did include a squeegee, but it's too big for use with this skin. Had I cut it down to size and used it, I may not have "dents" now.

reviews.title: Good idea
reviews.text: This is a good idea to protect the screen. If you where to scratch it you could just replace the screen saver.

reviews.title: My daughter is obsessed with the watch
reviews.text: This is a perfect alternative of a smart watch. I didn't want to get a real smart watch for my daughter because they are so expensive but she kept insisting on it. Saw this kids watch the other day and bought. She thinks it's an apple watch Haha. She loved it and I'm so happy.

reviews.title: She Loves It!
reviews.text: Picture and video is clear and the games and other things on it are fun. This will also help children to learn time and definitely a good beginners watch for a kid. She figured out how to use many of the features without my help. Lots of great features. She likes to set her alarm clock every morning. This is a great first watch and a perfect gift.

reviews.title: It was ok.
reviews.text:
It's very cute. But let's talk about it.
The Camara was a bit blurry.
Never tried the music option so I don't know.
The pedometer would mark a step even when just moving hands so that wasn't accurate.
We had some trouble setting the alarm clock and set chores.
And the games were cute and fun but killed the battery fast.
I guess I was hopping too much out of this.
It was a gift for my daughter since her timex watch went out. But unfortunately it doesn't have a connect to phone feature where she could receive messages when I'm out and about running errands or late to pick her up from school for that matter. The battery didn't last long and even though my girl liked it, it wasn't too functional for what we needed it for. As I was going to return it my dog had other plans. So yeah the watch didn't survived it's attacker. So it's not dog proofed. Lol 😂

reviews.title: My Approach S6 -- Near Perfection!
reviews.text: Very pleased with the quality of this band replacement for my Approach S6 band and the ease of installation. Having a buddy helps, but the installation is easily accomplished on your own within a matter of minutes.  The new band is more flexible than the original which, IMHO, is a plus.  What I can't say is that the original band might have stiffened with age.  Who knows and it doesn't matter.  The screwdrivers are also an awesome design -- the handle ends have a hex shape you can stick in your drill if your hands are weak.  The only minuscule minus is that the retainer bar/strap is a tad large as others have stated, but problem solved by reusing the retainer strap from the original band. VERY pleased with this purchase.

reviews.title: Everything and more from what i expected from a smart watch
reviews.text: i spent a great deal of time researching smart watches, Garmin came up the winner.  I have dealt with their customer service on two occasions with another product and found them to be excellent which i a big reason for buying another Garmin product.

reviews.title: Poor battery life, feature rich
reviews.text:
If only the battery life was better... I have the GPS turned off and I only measure my blood oxygen level when I'm asleep yet it is nearly impossible for the watch to last a little more than 24 hours.

My next Garmin will be the one with a solar powered assist.

That being said for the negatives this watch has the features I wanted at a good price:

- Sleep quality/quantity
- Blood oxygen level
- Steps counter
- Flight of stairs counting
- Water intake recording ) manual input)
- Multiple activities recording (it can detect when I'm running, bike riding, etc.)

It has been durable and the screen is still scratch free.

If poor battery life isn't a deal breaker buy it.

reviews.title: After a year and a half...can't wait to switch, Spotify is the worst part of this watch by far
reviews.text:
I have owned this watch for a year and a half now. I use it almost daily for my walks/runs, weight workouts, and indoor bike workouts. The main reason I chose this watch in the first place was because it was one of the smaller ones available. I am 5'9 but have small wrists, and really disliked the 'utilitarian' look of larger watches. After a year and a half, I am so tired of the issues with it and ready to jump ship. If I used this watch more regularly (I only wear it for workouts - not all day), I would have switched a LONG time ago. The amount of people who have complained about the same issues for YEARS without Garmin doing anything makes me hesitant to purchase another Garmin product, especially with the Apple Watch, Samsung, and now Google buying out Fitbit and coming up with a watch.
- Spotify on this watch seriously sucks. If you check Spotify forums, you will find COUNTLESS threads of suggestions for the Spotify app on this watch that should truly be basic features at this price. Do they implement them or listen? No. Also, there is no way to contact Spotify customer service - you just get pointed towards their 'community forum' where you have people complaining of the same exact things with no fix. You can't skip forward on any track, at all. I listen to a lot of podcasts when I walk. Some are 2 hours in length while my walk is only 1 hour. This watch constantly either reverts to the very beginning of my podcast so I have to start all over (because again, you can't skip forward - so have fun listening to ads as well!) in anything, only updates 1 song out of 15 on my playlist or get the error 'sync failed', or some other random issue. Also, if you have a playlist on Spotify, you cannot choose the track you want to listen to. You have to hit the >> button to get to where you want. Really? I hope Garmin drops Spotify because they have been a truly horrible app on this watch the entire time with no effort to make updates. Take a look at the reviews of Spotify on the Garmin store if you don't believe me.
- Battery life is a couple of days. However, there are points in time where my watch will be at say 80% the night before, I get ready to leave and go my walk the next morning, pick up my watch, and it's at 8%. WTF? This happens enough to be super annoying and apparently is not an 'only me' problem. It appears to be tied to when the watch updates.
- I tried to wear this to track my sleep in the beginning and gave up after two nights due to the extreme disco effect of the 'gesture' motions. I tried turning on the 'do not disturb' function advertised on the watch which is supposed to disable this stupidly bright light that WILL wake you and whoever is next to you up. Didn't work. Do a search for 'Garmin watch lights up in middle of the night' and you will find all sorts of people complaining of the same thing, and not just on this version of the watch.
- GPS has issues connecting and can take several minutes which is pretty annoying when you try to start tracking an activity only to see a red bar when trying to connect. I 'sync' my watch to my phone constantly so that is not the issue. I have switched between the GPS options Garmin offers on the watch to no avail. Search for this issue as well and you will see lots of people with the same complaint.

reviews.title: GET THIS WATCH!!!
reviews.text: I LOVE this watch!!! It is so easy to use, tracks all of the metrics I am interested in (steps, sleep, stress, activities, hydration, menstrual cycle) and then some!! It is very accurate and the app is very user- friendly. The watch itself has worked perfectly and I have found it to be comfortable and intuitive to use.  It holds a charge for several days on end and when it does need to be charged, it reaches full battery very quickly! I looked at a lot of different watches and considered a lot of different options. I am so happy that I went with the vivoactive 4! Garmin, you all did a great job with this watch!! I honestly could not be happier with my choice!!

reviews.title: A Gift that went well
reviews.text:
This was a Christmas gift for my wife to replace her older Vivosmart. She wanted the new features but she has a small wrist.
Doing some searches I thought this would be as big as I should try.

All went well. It does all she needs and while it's much better it's not too big. Doing larger does add more battery time and more features, but this is the right fit for her

reviews.title: Beautiful Smart Watch
reviews.text: Very pleased.  Handsome titanium case.  Looks more like a  traditional watch than a smart watch.  All functions work on my IPhone 13.  Great choice of faces, including several analog choices.  Always on display is great,  Only one semi-negative.  You must have patience during the pairing process.  Same thing true with programming.  But once it is done, could not ask more from a reasonably priced smart watch. No help from a basically useless manual.  You are on your own.  But, with patience, worth the time it takes to figure out how to pair and operate  Took me about an hour.  Highly recommended

reviews.title: Battery life runs out quickly.
reviews.text: Nice looking.  Great apps and tracking. But battery life isn't all that great.

reviews.title: A good start but needs a lot of work.
reviews.text:
This is a tough review to write. If I could do half stars, this watch would be a 3.5 for me. It does so much right but it feels incomplete and overpriced to me.

First off, the screen and overall build quality is amazing. I have a Galaxy Active 2 as well and, candidly, this Zepp watch is better in pretty much every way in terms of build. The glass feels better and more scratch resistant. You get a stainless frame instead of aluminum. The shocker is the screen. I am not sure how but this watch looks brighter and crisper to me. The size is really nice as well. The Zepp E has a lower profile and almost no visible bezel. If hardware was the lone consideration, this would get a near perfect score.

The battery life is also really outstanding. I get 5 to 7 days with this. It has a proprietary magnetic charger that works well. Even playing with it often and tracking regular workouts doesn't seem to bother it.

I also like Zepp's approach to overall health measurement. The PAI (Personal Activity Intelligence) score tries to give you an overall measurement of how healthy your days are. Once you understand it, I think it is a good general snap shot. If everyone tracked their life like this, the world would be a much healthier place. Sleep tracking is good as well. In line with what I have gotten from Fitbit and Samsung though you need to make sure to set a daily screen timer as it doesn't automatically know to turn off the screen when you are sleeping like the others.

From here though things begin to slip. At $250, there is no onboard GPS. This is a big omission at this price. There also isn't auto tracking for workouts like most others have so you have to remember to physically start tracking workouts. There is no onboard music player though you can control your music from the watch. Interacting with your notifications and inbound calls are all but worthless. Zepp's app is also a mess. It is cumbersome and not well thought out. Everything you want is there but it often takes alot of effort to get from one thing to another. Samsung's app is vastly superior. Lastly, the watch comes with a leather strap. At the time of this writing, Zepp has silicone straps listed on their site but they don't appear to be available yet. A watch that is focused on health should come default with a silicone strap.

I guess I am just not sure what Zepp set out to accomplish with this watch. Is it a smart watch? Not really. Is it a fitness watch? Kind of. Its like they tried to split the baby and ended up accomplishing neither successfully. If you want a good looking everyday digital semi-smart watch with a great battery life, this is worth considering but, for most, at $250, there are better options out there. Perhaps Zepp will update this product and make it more well rounded. If not, I would suggest waiting for a price reduction before investing.

reviews.title: Only thing missing is the talk and messaging
reviews.text: Otherwise, it is similar to Apple watch. I easily set this up and downloaded the software from the app store. It installed easily with absolutely zero issues and you know it is always the software that has glitches. This watch is probably one of the better health smart watches on the market.. It looks nice, it performs nice and has lots of features. You will love the battery life, especially if you have a smartwatch that has to be charged almost daily or maybe ever day and a half. The watch monitors sleep stages, heart rate and 11 different exercises, including swimming. And, it is nice looking. Pretty sweet. I wanted to add that you can select so many faces for your watch without extra charges.

reviews.title: Broke 3 weeks after purchasing
reviews.text: To be fair with the manufacturer, one does not expect for your watch to fall often. In this case, the only time it fell, BOOM - the screen broke on one corner and the display became unusable.

features: PREMIUM DISPLAY: Large 1.69-inch TFT-LCD color HD touch screen featuring customized displays, wake up function to easily see time, date, steps, calories and distance. You can personalize the dial with many of our style options, and can even upload a personal picture to be on your smart watch background

SMART FUNCTIONS: Receive Call, Text, Whatsapp and Social Media notifications. Incoming calls can be alerted via vibration reminders, with the option to hang up. Display up to 128 characters on your tracker screen. Sedentary alerts can be turned On, to be alerted with vibration reminders after a specific time of no movement. Alarm clock + timer, and calendar alerts are also shown on the screen as notifications. Option to sync data with Strava

ALL DAY FITNESS TRACKING: Track your daily activities with a built-in accelerometer sensor that allows you to track distance traveled, record steps, get calories burned, and review active minutes, including pace. Your workout progress can be simply viewed directly from our app, by choosing between 14 different sports modes including Outdoor / Outdoor Running and Walking, Outdoor cycling, Spinning bike, Cricket, Hiking, Swimming, Yoga,Rowing machine, Elliptical trainer, Fitness, and others

HEART RATE, BLOOD OXYGEN, SLEEP AND STRESS MONITOR: Automatically monitors your daily heart rate, blood oxygen and stress. You can read directly on the watch all day, which helps you understand your health and make reasonable adjustments on your life style. Also monitors your sleep which gives you a comprenhensive analysis of your sleep. Our app allows you to review graphs that analyze how deep or light is your sleep and your wake-up times.

APP PAIRING AND BATTERY: pairing is simple, by using Bluetooth 4.2, automatically sync your device to a phone using iOS 8. 0/Android OS 4. 4 or above. Built with a 300mAh battery that takes less than 2 hours to charge and can be used for up to 10 days with a standby time of 30-45 days. You can adjust the screen brightness according to your needs

reviews.title: Great watch for a great price
reviews.text: I was skeptical about the watch as I had purchased other watches only to have them fail miserably. This watch turned out great. The most important thing to do is read the manual. Especially about how to wear the watch, which is a little higher than a normal watch. This will make the accuracy much better. The step counter is controlled by arm movement not actual steps, so if you walk stiff armed , it will be inaccurate. Move your arms when walking , the watch will be much more accurate.Make sure you go into the app on your phone and activate the exercises your interested in. This will help the watch to track it better. Also activate the media part of the app for sms,email etc. You can also monitor who is calling you, so you can choose to answer you phone or not. I am extremely pleased with my purchase and will be watching for other products from this company.

reviews.title: Loved it..: til it burned me!
reviews.text: I loved it until I woke up with a burn!!

reviews.title: As advertised
reviews.text: Great watch! Exactly what I wanted (a watch to count steps and that is easy to read). The set up was fairly easy - I received the watch in the early evening and had it set up within half an hour ( I am in my seventies). This is my 3rd watch - first was very expensive and too invasive - second watch cost twice as much as this one and quit charging in the second week - third times a charm.

reviews.title: Hard to set up.
reviews.text: Very difficult to program. I will be sending it back.

reviews.title: There were very little instructions on how to use/set up the watch.  Had to go online to search.
reviews.text: Face of watch is good, and seems like good quality.  Plus I like that it is a touch screen/can swipe.

reviews.title: Pretty but...
reviews.text: I've had this for less than 2 weeks and the brackets around the black straps have patinaed and the black covering on the "leather" straps have started to sluff off. Not impressed

reviews.title: Love this Fitbit band!
reviews.text: This band really dressed my Fitbit up and is comfortable to wear. I purchased it in black as well. I like that you can easily take out links to make the band smaller as I have a very small wrist. Great price too!

reviews.title: Picture is better
reviews.text: Band is large. Clip comes undone. You have to be very careful when wearing.

title: Cillso Smart Watch for Men, IP68 Waterproof Fitness Tracker, Smartwatch for Android iPhone Phones, Activity Tracker with Heart Rate and Sleep Monitor, 24 Sports Modes, Pedometer, Black
features: More Personal, Clearer Touch Screen: 1.3 inch tempered HD LCD with IPS technology for enhanced color and clarity. And covered with an aluminum alloy frame, so elegant and light to wear, but sturdy and anti-scratch.The smart watch contains 5 dials readily available to choose from along with another 50 more dials within the app. You can also with custom setting your favorite photo from phone album as screen background to meet your daily needs and define different moods.

Your Personal Smart Assistant: Activity tracker (pedometer, calories, distance), heart rate, various sport modes, sleep monitoring,etc. Get notifications of Call, SMS, and APP messages(The fitness tracker watch can not make messages, calls or text back), remote control of music and cameras, weather report, sedentary reminder, alarm clock, stopwatch, find phone, call rejection, brightness adjustment, power-saving mode, and other functions to meet your daily needs.

Long Battery and IP68 Waterproof: The waterproof smart watch can be used for 10-15 days or 30 days standby time, much longer than most traditional smartwatch, and only takes 2.5 hours to charge. The fitness watch is IP68 waterproof, you can wear it when washing hands, in the rain(Note: Do Not use in water more than 100. 40℉, such as showers, saunas, spring, etc).

24 Sports Modes and Health Monitoring: Our fitness tracker for men women supports 24 sports modes and allows you to record fitness data including steps, distance, calories burned, miles walked. Advanced HR sensor for accurate and effective heart rate monitoring, helping you better understand your health and making a reasonable adjustment to your lifestyle. Automatic sleep tracking can monitor your sleep status and provide a comprehensive sleep quality analysis to help become healthier.

Smart Notifications and Compatibility: The rugged smart watch is compatible with most iOS 9.0 & Android 5.0 or higher smart phones. Pair our activity tracker to your phone and receive all your SNS notifications straight to your round smart watch including Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, Whatsapp, and more (Please note: messages are for viewing only). And support control the music playback or camera on your smartphone.

reviews.title: Pretty good
reviews.text:
Pretty good smartwatch. I needed something to replace my Galaxy Active, but didn't want to spend $100+ on something with a horrible battery life. I bought this one and for a while I was disappointed. I had to charge the watch each night and the steps weren't as accurate. I changed the setting so that the screen doesn't turn on when you move your wrist and that has saved the battery big time. I'm on day 4 and only down to 50% which means I'm now able to track sleep as well. I still think the steps aren't as accurate because it almost matches the steps in my phone's health app, but I'm notorious for leaving my phone places. I also miss being able to limit the options for exercise types in the watch face. I have to scroll through a long list each time. Overall, pretty good product for a cheaper price.

Update: I originally gave this 5 stars, but I have to take 2 away. A few days ago, the watch all of a sudden stopped counting steps. For the price, it was perfect until it stopped working. Back to the drawing board.

reviews.title: The perfect watch
reviews.text: Hubby loves his birthday watch , has no complaints. Says it’s the perfect watch, for all he uses it for. .

title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 4 Classic 42mm Smartwatch with ECG Monitor Tracker for Health Fitness Running Sleep Cycles GPS Fall Detection Bluetooth US Version, Black (Renewed)
description: This pre-owned or refurbished product has been professionally inspected and tested to work and look like new. How a product becomes part of Amazon Renewed, your destination for pre-owned, refurbished products: A customer buys a new product and returns it or trades it in for a newer or different model. That product is inspected and tested to work and look like new by Amazon-qualified suppliers. Then, the product is sold as an Amazon Renewed product on Amazon. If not satisfied with the purchase, renewed products are eligible for replacement or refund under the Amazon Renewed Guarantee.
features: 1.2 "(30.5mm) w/ Rotating Bezel, Super AMOLED, 396 x 396 pixels (~330 ppi density), 16M Colors, CPU: Dual-Core 1.15GHz, 247mAh Battery, Android Wear OS, One UI Watch 3, Bluetooth, Wi-Fi
The Galaxy Watch4 Classic uses red LEDs and infrared rays to calculate your SpO2 levels or the amount of oxygen in your blood.
Glass front (Gorilla Glass DX+), MIL-STD-810G compliant, 50m water-resistant (IP68), Compatible with standard 20mm straps, ECG certified, Blood pressure monitor
5 ATM / IP68 The water and dust resistance rating, Military-grade durability, Larger screen but lighter and thinner for more comfort.
Compatible with Android Phones Running Android 6.0 and Above. NOT compatible with iOS.

reviews.title: Just the works.
reviews.text: It didn't have any manual or anything written enclosed to help a novice like me get it charged up and working.  I'm waiting for my son to arrive for setup help.  It looks like new with no scratches, no blemishes or other indications of wear.

reviews.title: Great Watch
reviews.text: I bought this watch I’m a refurbished deal during Amazon days. I never thought I would find myself wearing this type of watch, but I absolutely find myself loving it. I took this deal hesitantly but find that I can’t tell the difference between this and a new watch. The watch arrived absolutely flawless and looked like a brand new watch. I really see no difference between It and Products that I have received new. I reviewed other watches and other types of watches before purchasing the watch 4, But I am truly glad that I made the purchase that I did. I’m also very satisfied with the refurbish condition I got from Amazon.

reviews.title: Returned bad battery life
reviews.text:
Never really got to use the watch. Battery in normal mode only lasted about 10 hours. In battery saver mode the battery level dropped 10% in 7 hours with the watch turned off and sitting on a dresser not being worn.
Not worth the cost in my eyes.

reviews.title: this is the worst watch I have ever had

had it on the charger for about 4 days, and still goes empty in about 4 hours
